user.title: Select Knob Device
user.description: Choose the Matter knob device to configure as a proxy controller.

entities.title: Configure Target Entities
entities.description: Map each knob control to a Home Assistant entity.

abort.no_knobs_found: No unconfigured Matter knob devices found. Please commission your knob first via the Matter integration.
abort.matter_not_loaded: The Matter integration is not loaded. Please set up Matter first.

error.invalid_entity: The selected entity is not available or does not exist.
error.missing_mappings: Please configure at least one target entity.

init.title: Update Target Entities
init.description: Change the entity mappings for your knob.
